headline: How The Investment Story Is Shifting For Yum Brands (YUM) After New Targets And Pizza Hut Talks
summary: The fair value estimate for Yum! Brands has been adjusted from US$172.25 to US$174.23, a move of about 1.2% that keeps the price target conversation very much alive. This update comes as analysts debate how well the current share price reflects the strength of the KFC and Taco Bell franchises, along with the broader shift in ratings, including a recent upgrade to Overweight. Read on to see how these target changes fit into the evolving story and what to watch as the narrative develops. Wall...

headline: A Look At Yum Brands (YUM) Valuation After Tracy Skeans Announces Retirement
summary: Yum! Brands (YUM) is back in focus after announcing that longtime Chief Operating Officer and Chief People & Culture Officer Tracy Skeans will retire. This leadership change draws attention to the company’s succession planning and execution risk. See our latest analysis for Yum! Brands. Alongside the leadership transition and talks to sell Pizza Hut, Yum! Brands’ recent 30 day share price return is down 3.78%, while its 1 year total shareholder return is 5.63%.
